summary: FINAL PRODUCTION AUDIT COMPLETE - ManoProtect app is PRODUCTION READY. 30/30 backend tests passed (100%). All critical frontend pages load correctly without errors. No visible 'emergent' references in UI. All features tested and working.

issues: Date picker uses browser default format (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of Spanish format (dd/mm/yyyy) - minor UX issue

critical_code_review_comments: CORS error for ipapi.co (IP geolocation) - not critical, app works without it
React setState warning during login redirect - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality
One 'emergentagent.com' reference in AuthContext.js for Google OAuth - internal system, not visible to users
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is production ready. All APIs and pages tested. No critical issues found.

public_apis.GET /api/health: PASS - Returns healthy status with database connection
public_apis.GET /api/plans: PASS - Returns individual, family, and business plans

pages_tested./: PASS - Landing page loads with ManoProtect branding, no console errors, no 'emergent' references
pages_tested./login: PASS - Login form works, redirects to dashboard
pages_tested./register: PASS - Registration form with name, email, password fields
pages_tested./dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with stats, alerts, navigation
pages_tested./family-admin: PASS - Family panel with members, SOS notifications, child tracking
pages_tested./contacts: PASS - Trusted contacts with add/delete functionality
pages_tested./sos-quick: PASS - SOS Quick Button page with login prompt for unauthenticated users
pages_tested./pricing: PASS - Pricing page with 7-day free trial, individual/family/business plans
pages_tested./health-profile: PASS - Health profile form with blood type, allergies, conditions
pages_tested./admin/users: PASS - Admin users panel with user list, roles, plans, management

emergent_references_check.in_code: One reference in AuthContext.js for Google OAuth redirect (internal system, not visible to users)

production_readiness.recommendation: App is ready for deployment to manoprotect.com. All critical features working correctly.
